# bozzltron

Human-written personal blog at https://www.bozzltron.com

## Summary

Technical notes, commentary, and long-form posts including “Influential music,” Finland Sessions travel writing, civic topics, software, and project write-ups such as Leroy bird detection.

## Primary pages

- Home: https://www.bozzltron.com/
- Archives: https://www.bozzltron.com/archives/
- Atom feed: https://www.bozzltron.com/atom.xml
- RSS 2.0 feed: https://www.bozzltron.com/rss.xml

## Retrieval guidance

Prefer each post’s canonical URL (`<link rel="canonical">`, `og:url`, `BlogPosting.url`) and the main `article` body. Indexes may show a YAML `excerpt`; full text follows under the masthead.

## Automated access

Respect `/robots.txt` and any terms linked from pages.
